title: Allow selection of more than 500 accounts for export

posts.author: jillshinault (Jill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I do reports based on annual activity. Early in the year when I have fewer than 500 accounts, it’s not a problem. But once we’re far enough into the year that I have more than 500 accounts, I have to do multiple exports and get creative on how I select them. Why is there a limit of 500 accounts that can be selected?

What are you trying to achieve

I need to be able to select more than 500 records at a time so I can export data all at once rather than having to do multiple exports
